text.tspan: HIV funding in low- and middle-income countries, by region
Total resources dedicated to prevention and treatment of HIV , and care and support activities. This data is
expressed in US dollars and is adjusted for inflation but does not account for differences in living costs between
Data source: Joint United Nations Programme on HIV/AIDS (2025)
Note: This data is expressed in constant 2019 US$.
